creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi.

It could help if you provided some more information about the issue, for 
example verbose kernel messages recorded in some way. IIRC I've tested 
non-ATA_CAM kernel after 9.1 release, and it worked fine for me.

Also could you please describe why do you want to use non-ATA_CAM mode?

-- 
Alexander Motin
